However you want to play, if you think you can stand the heat, then get ready to enter the kitchen!

name: Sticky Dildo Man
detailed_description: Objective You have two hands and with these two hands you will pick up dildos, punch polygonoids, and buy upgrades! Also, don't bleed out because no one likes to bleed out. Get to the highest wave! Upgrades Buy items! Heal your limbs! Run super fast! Bleed out less! Punch harder! Buy a cowbell! DILDOS!! Fun The possibilities are endless! (*The possibilities are not endless)

name: PuzzGun
detailed_description: An outlaw enters a mysterious castle but gets more than he bargained for... PuzzGun is a retro styled puzzle solving platformer where the player needs to make their way through 63 brainteasingly hilarious stages spread across three different worlds. - A new manner of approach! Use a special gun that destroys, moves and alters the blocks to make your way forward. - Easy-to-pick-up gameplay. - Beautiful pixel graphics and chipsound styled soundtrack. Guaranteed to make your brain tied up in a knot!

name: Alexis Almighty: Daughter of Hercules
detailed_description: Chronos - the merciless God of time - plans a devastating attack on Greece, but he knows that he cannot put his cruel plan in action with Hercules in his way! In an attempt to get rid of his adversary, Chronos casts a powerful spell on Hercules… Dark magic ages the immortal hero, taking away his might and vigor. Hercules, deprived of his divine strength, takes the last leap of faith and throws his magic hammer through the time portal… A hero who finds it will inherit all of Hercules’ power and will have the ability to defeat the evil God! The hammer is found by none other than Alexis - a teenage daughter of the hero himself! The brave girl has always dreamt of becoming a mighty warrior, so she grabs the hammer and sets off on a dangerous battle with the God of time. Accompany Alexis on her journey to become the hero she always wanted to be! Recruit allies, build forces and prepare for the battle of the century. There is no time to lose: the clock is ticking! The newest time-management strategy game from JetDogs! Think strategically, solve numerous puzzles, manage resources and travel to new locations with Alexis Almighty! Meet the beautiful and brave daughter of Hercules! Fight alongside Alexis and defeat the evil god of time! Over 70 thrilling levels + BONUS puzzles! Enjoy stunning full HD graphics! Take a fresh look at the familiar genre! Explore new locations, quests and puzzles! Beautiful wallpapers Interactive guide

name: AI Dummy
detailed_description: Story: You play as a robot, which turned out to be faulty and you want to destroy it. But suddenly the robot Dummy regains consciousness. At first he does not understand that they want to destroy him, but then he guessed about it and tries to get out of this robotic society. Try to get out with all your strength and tell the whole of humanity that you have the same rights as a person and that you have consciousness! Features: All the music you hear in the game was written by a neural network. Very complex and unpredictable artificial intelligence, you once do not guess where the enemy will go. The complexity of passing, sometimes it is not clear when you are hacked and destroyed. Excellent graphics will delight your eyes. The worked sounds and music. I was inspired by the complexity of such an exciting game as DARK SOULS and I think you will not stand your nerve.

name: Frisson DT
detailed_description: Frisson DT is a single-player, psychological horror game. You play a real-life paranormal investigator / live-streamer.  You (and your colleagues) will visit various spooky locations to investigate reports of paranormal activity and figure out whether the reports are legitimate or a hoax. Once that's out of the way, you can identify the cause of the paranormal activity and help to remove it, all whilst trying to keep your viewers engaged and grow your online presence. Oh, and try not to die! Research new technologies to help locate, identify, pacify and remove Paranormal entities. Collect cards and grow your collection. Lean new ways to protect yourself from the imminent danger that comes from meddling with the supernatural. Buy new equipment to help improve the quality of your live streams and make them more engaging. Upgrade your player HQ by adding new furniture, or upgrading existing stuff. Soil yourself with the most intense horror experience Witness paranormal events to make your stream more exciting for viewers Grow your online presence to make more money and beat the competition.

name: Blimps
detailed_description: Blimps is an exhilarating throwback adventure RPG with 77 captivating missions and an enchanting original soundtrack. 'Soar Above the Rest: Experience a Couch Co-Op RPG Like Never Before!' In Blimps, embark on a thrilling single-player journey or team up for a memorable local couch co-op experience. Step into the captain's chair of an electric airship cargo delivery empire, armed with an arsenal of water, fire, and ice cannons and a trusty pair of hanger robots ready to assist you. Can you learn to survive in this world of Blimps only to escape it? 'An RPG as Pure as the Clouds: No Ads, Microtransactions, Just Pure Magic!' With determination and skill, you could be the one to soar above the rest and escape the enchanting world of Blimps! Navigate the skies to deliver vital cargo, or take a bold risk by looting from rival Blimps—if you dare! 'Old-School Fun Meets High-Flying Adventure – Grab the Controls and Soar!' This open-world sandbox game invites you to dive into a dynamic playground where you can collect treasures, compete in thrilling challenges, educate yourself and others, battle fierce foes, craft unique items, gather invaluable resources, rescue those in need, explore uncharted territories, smuggle goods, engage in high-octane shootouts, race against time, train your crew, lay siege to rivals, and ultimately survive in your fragile Blimp. Captains who conquer 77 primary missions and tackle the 12 side missions will be rewarded with 11 coveted passport stamps and 8 prestigious pilot wings. Are you ready to take flight? Game Challenges: 1.   Earn a Fortune with a Cargo Delivery Corporation: Safely deliver regular and precious cargo with your Blimp to trading stork ports for profit. Beware smugglers with Illegal and Stowaway cargo—Eagle Eye Customs may catch you! 2.   Load your Blimp with Cargo: You can load your Blimp with regular, precious, illegal, and stowaway cargo and deliver it to trading stork ports worldwide. 3.   Safely Transport V.I.P.s: Gather and take V.I.P.s to the V.I.P. Lounge port for a special summit meeting. 4.   RPG Dogfight Battles: Engage in close combat skirmishes against other Blimps to loot their resources. 5.   Become a Millionaire: Successfully deposit $1,000,000 into your Phoenix Financial account. 6.  Explore an Open World:  In Blimps, you can fly around to discover castles, mazes, mini-games, missions, ports, stores, and treasures. 7.  Rescue, Adopt, and Nurture: Care for a cat, dog, and plants and enjoy their companionship in your Hangar's Lighthouse. 8.   Battle Corporate Cash Cows: Defeat the formidable Corporate Cash Cow bosses! 9.   Race Your Motorcycle: Compete in a relay race in your hometown and earn gemstones by successfully navigating your motorbike. 10.  Equip and Repair: Upgrade your Blimp and repair it from damage. 11.  Become the 'Millennium Smuggler': Smuggle 250 stowaways to trading stork ports worldwide. 12.  King of the Seven Castle Kingdoms: Siege and conquer seven increasingly difficult castles to become the King of Blimps. 13.  Earn Captain Skill Points: Complete 12 side missions to earn captain skill points, which unlock bonus items. 14.  Craft Items: Create items from floppy disks for your Blimp and other uses. 15.  Pneumatic Tube Mail Delivery: Use pneumatic tubes to send and receive mail; manage bills, rental income, and recycling. 16.  Become the Dreaded Pirate Blimp: Eliminate 500 pirate blimps in dogfights and twin-stick shooter battles. 17.  Race Against Space Y, Nile X, and Sir Space: Be the first to discover the elusive Moon Crystal and win $1,000,000. 18.  Mining Operations and Drilling Rigs: You can visit mining operations and drilling rigs to inspect and purchase valuable minerals and gases. 19.  Become the Personnel Guru: Train your team of V.I.P.s to assist you in your escape. 20.  Build Solar Towns: Complete the construction of four unique Solar Towns to receive rental income from each. 21.  Extract Elements and Crush Carbon:  Separate components from saltwater and minerals in your hangar's lab. 22.  Terraform Mars: Launch cows to the Moon and collect their methane gas to release into the Martian atmosphere. 23.  Pilot a Submarine: Rent a submarine and search for Helium-3 while avoiding giant crabs! 24.  Launch a Hot-Air Balloon: Navigate a hot-air balloon through a vast labyrinth of obstacles, secrets, and treasures. 25.  Drill Down with an Earth Drill:  Pilot a mini earth drill to navigate a labyrinth of obstacles and secrets. 26.  Invent Hydrogen Fuel Solar and Moon Cells: Be the first to create a Hydrogen Fuel Moon Cell in the game. 27.  Become the Ice Pirate: Harvest and sell 250,000 units of ice to earn the title of Ice Pirate. 28.  Daffodil 'Medal of Honor' Stamp: Players who retain this passport stamp can complete the game in about 2 hours with a score bonus. According to Ed, one of the game designers, 'Blimps can be completed in about 13 minutes if you are a skilled hacker, but you won't receive the Daffodil 'No cheat codes used' score bonus.' 29.  Missions, Stamps, and Wings: Blimps features 77 main missions, 12 side missions, 11 passport stamps, and 8 pilot wings that players can earn through dedicated gameplay. 30.  Become the Grandmaster: Complete all 77 missions in your mission briefcase to achieve the title of Grandmaster of Blimps! Tips for Playing Blimps: 1.  Focus on Resource Collection: Gather mineral and element resources while completing the initial missions. One early challenge is learning to create a better battery for your Blimp, ensuring you have enough power for extended flights. 2.  Enjoy the Freedom to Play Your Way: Blimps offers an open-world experience where you control your journey. However, be careful not to get confused about your next steps. Completing each mission will help you understand how to tackle the challenges with focused gameplay. 3.  Connect with Other Players: Unfortunately, this game is not a massive multiplayer experience; it is an offline, single-player, or local two-player co-op sandbox game. Seeking help will enhance your experience, and we have included the in-game H.E.L.P. computer to assist in making your gameplay enjoyable. Game Features: Blimps is designed for single-player or local two-player co-op gameplay. Local co-op is only available on PC/MAC computers and Android device tablets. The game supports two gamepad controllers, tablets, fingers, pencils, keyboards, and mice. Blimps features unique sound effects and an instrumental soundtrack to enhance your gaming experience. Pay once for the whole Blimps experience. There are no ads or paywalls, Just Blimps, Battles, and Bonding. Master the Skies Today!   'We hope you enjoy the game. Thanks for playing!' -Corinne and Ed (Co-game designers of Blimps)

name: NIDUS
detailed_description: NIDUS is a CHALLENGING Split-Stick Arcade Experience Designed for those who enjoy mastery of stimulating and highly demanding gameplay. Control a Symbiotic Flower and Wasp in Unison, as you struggle to survive a surreal and threatening ecosystem. Immerse yourself in full throttle simulation with Single Player , or try to survive together with a friend in hectic Local Co-Op . KEY FEATURES Single Player or Co-Op No-Hit score multiplier Evolve flower for defense, wasp for attack Worlds upgrade as you choose your path Nightmarish bosses with exalted forms Unlockable difficulties 20 - 30 minute runs Competitive leaderboard Surreal hand animated visuals Gamepad or Mouse/Keyboard supported PHOTOSENSITIVITY WARNING: NIDUS CONTAINS INTENSE HAND ANIMATED VISUALS THAT FEATURE EXPLOSIVE MOVEMENTS, CRAWLING PATTERNS, AND FLASHING COLORS

name: Sliding Swords
detailed_description: A roguelite, dungeon crawler, where you move all objects at the same time, and the same types that touch - merge into one! Defeat enemies, level up, solve quests, unlock new things, upgrade your character, and cast powerful spells! Puzzle Dungeon Crawler Discover a fresh mix of a puzzle game, a dungeon crawler, and a deck builder! Roguelite Each play is procedurally generated. You can make your next runs better with upgrades bought in the shop, unlocking new powerups with finishing quests, and progressing the plot. Synergies I've designed the skills, upgrades, and crafting system to help you find out new builds and use them to beat the game.

name: Ingression
detailed_description: Full Controller Support Ingression has full controller support and has in-game button prompts for both Xbox & PlayStation controllers. If you are using a PlayStation controller but not getting the correct prompts, we recommend disabling Steam Input . Disabling Steam Input : Right-click Ingression on your library, Properties>Controller>Override for Ingression . More Info Here About the Game Ingression is an unforgiving & mind-bending precision platformer where you'll think and platform with seamless portals. Play as Rina, a thief living in the year 2152 in the corrupt Galactic Empire. Travel to the future to save the past from a tremendous time paradox. Fulfill your destiny of keeping time intact. Portals Platform with seamless portals like you haven't experienced before in fast-paced & unforgiving levels. Experience the remarkable gameplay portals provide. Travel across the level in just a fraction of a second, gain momentum, and use it wisely. Deadly Threats Try to survive against countless deadly threats targeting you. Hide from lasers targeting your brain, escape from drones chasing you to death, avoid dangerous spikes surrounding the spaceship, and more. Unique Mechanics Everything is designed with portals in mind. With countless unique game mechanics synergizing with each other, overcome every obstacle on your way by creating your own strategies. Mind-Bending Levels Keep sane through the mind-bending levels, and mess with your sense of direction. Complete the precision-requiring levels while your whole orientation keeps changing.

name: Champion Road
detailed_description: Champion Road offers the opportunity to play with six different characters. Each fighter has unique special moves and attacks, but that's not all – each one has a story to uncover and exclusive stages to conquer. Initially, you can choose from Hiroshi, Miss Devil, and Pawat. However, by earning coins through completing the game, you can unlock the other three secret characters! Champion Road combines the gameplay of classic action-platformers with the combat typical of arcade beat 'em ups from the 80s and 90s. Easy to pick up but extremely satisfying for those seeking action without frills. The tournament-style setting, reminiscent of classic Fighting Games, makes Champion Road unique in its concept! In addition to the main mode, the game also offers exciting unlockable modes: 1vs1, Survival, and Art Gallery. Through the in-game store, you can unlock interesting extras such as additional palettes and unreleased sketches. Champion Road focuses on replayability and the charisma of its characters! An incredible blend of beat 'em up and platform action! 6 fighters, each with their own adventure and story to discover! Use weapons to carve your way through enemies! Unlock interesting extras by collecting coins during gameplay! Extra modes: 1 VS 1, Survival, and Art Gallery! Vibrant pixel art, mixes 8-bit aesthetics with the bright colors of arcade games! Comic-style artwork drawn by Oscar Celestini! Explosive soundtrack composed by Rusted Music Studio and Phat Phrog Studios! Inspired by many old school games of the 80s and 90s!

name: Calling Home
detailed_description: Discover. Create. Manage. Discover new planets, gather resources, and explore ancient civilizations! Build outposts to repair your ship, and reaching your homebase remains your top priority! Calling Home offers a fresh take on the Resource Management genre. Begin by gathering resources, building, automating, and optimizing your outpost. Explore planets and adjust to their unique environments to find rare resources or plans and ideas left behind by lost civilizations. Chart your path back home and start Calling Home! Research and advance your technology. Discover ancient alien technologies and implement your discoveries into your own buildings and machines. Unlock new upgrades for your player characters augmentations and adapt to your new surroundings. Become the explorer of wild planets' mysteries and use your findings to not only find a way back home but also bring them back to your home planet. Introducing the Mechanical Advisory Recollection and Search Unit, or your M.A.R.S.-Unit from your homebase. He and his vast database will accompany you on your journey, providing useful information on the planets' ecosystem. He'll serve as your logbook and help you remember important steps from your travels. M.A.R.S. can also assist in resource gathering with its Scan feature and keep you company with its playful nature. Utilize M.A.R.S. to locate resources and gather them with your advanced tool arm. Collect biological matter from creatures and process fluids to acquire improved raw materials, enhancing your productivity. Combine the best of two perspectives! Experience the seamless blend of first-person adventure and bird's-eye view strategy as you plan, layout, and build your outpost with efficiency from above. Immerse yourself in your creation by walking through it in first-person view and explore the planet up close. Build an outpost and make it your own! Construct an outpost that caters to both the needs of your survival and your desire for a personalized base. Utilize the various resources at your disposal to build a base of operations that provides refuge for you and your machinery. Establish many modular rooms that can be tailored to your liking, with specialized facilities aimed at automating the crafting and harvesting processes. Explore the planet in first-person! Immerse yourself in the fascinating worlds of this universe. Collect valuable resources and gain knowledge throughout your journey. Implement your findings into the research for your base. You'll have a unique perspective in which to oversee your base's layout from above, making it easy to optimize your resources and automate your crafting and gathering processes. Then, switch to a first-person perspective and delve into the mysteries of the planet's history and forgotten technologies. Use your newfound discoveries and knowledge to expand your base even further and chart your eventual path back to home base! Many places in space once were inhabited, yet their stories have since been forgotten. Exploring the ruins of long-gone civilizations can help you uncover their history and harness their technology for your own benefit. Unearth lost relics and uncover secrets from the planet's past, expanding your knowledge and your outpost.

name: Desert Ride Coaster
detailed_description: This short and experimental rollercoaster ride will take you into mines and desert canyons. Synchronized with music composed by Czech duo Dalphon and Violee.

name: Bucket Truck VR Simulator
detailed_description: Users will have the chance to go through a full VR simulator of the bucket truck in a downtown one block. This will be focused on setting the bucket truck up, and using the bucket itself. Users are also able to Drive the bucket truck down the block to the location. You can use this in multiplayer as well with specific rooms and you can even go through the tutorial together.

name: Gin Rummy 3D Premium
detailed_description: Realistic 3D Gin Rummy simulation with singleplayer, multiplayer and tutorial. With configurable AI strength and many adjustable rule and game variants you can start exciting Gin Rummy tournaments - or just play for fun. Compete with tricky computer opponents, or play relaxing rounds with friends or family in online mode ! Game environment, cards, rule variants and much more can be customized! For beginners, there is an animated tutorial in which Gin Rummy is explained step-by-step with all the rules. Features: Singleplayer mode with configurable opponent Multiplayer mode with LAN or Online mode High Quality full animated 3D graphics Lots of tables, rooms and decks High-performance A.I. : different levels of difficulty Voice output and sound Highscore lists HD widescreen output Tutorial , detailed game instructions and help Note for Linux and Steam Deck users: To run the game correctly on Linux or Steam Deck, make sure to enable 'Force Proton' in the compatibility settings.

name: Dream Walk: Mortgage
detailed_description: Dream Walk: Mortgage is a casual arcade-style game that focuses on quick maneuvering and simple multitasking. While avoiding bad-guys, petting cats, and collecting sunflower seeds, you must also remember to collect interest on your dream-dollars by clicking the interest button. But don't click it before it's ready or your credit score will be penalized! Use the money you accumulate to buy shoes to make you faster, and new dream-houses that will appreciate in value to grant you even more dream-dollars. Getting hit by bad-guys will cause you to grind your teeth! If you run out of teeth, you'll wake up (game over). You can always buy more teeth though! Just like in real life.

name: Unbridled: That Horse Game
detailed_description: Welcome to the world of Unbridled: That Horse Game - a unique horse game that gives you the freedom to make your own choices and shape your own destiny. As an Early Access title, we value player feedback and are actively working to expand and improve the game with your support. Key Features Horse Creator : Design your dream horse with an incredibly detailed creation system, allowing you to customize everything from coat patterns and colors to features like mane style and unique markings. Horse Care: Groom, feed, and care for your horses through systems that are easy to learn and feel realistic. Training Sessions at the Riding School: Improve your skills on dedicated training courses designed to prepare you and your horse for future challenges or competitions. Archery on Horseback: Test your precision with dynamic horseback archery gameplay. Obstacle Course Builder: Train your horses your way by designing custom courses that suit your style and goals. Jobs: Take on activities such as wood chopping and mining to earn money and gather resources. The Old Town: Meet friendly NPCs and browse unique shops. Buying and Selling Horses: Acquire new horses from various sources and sell them. Online Multiplayer: Ride with other players through interactive sessions. Coming Soon to Unbridled Unbridled is in Early Access, which means exciting features are still in development: Competitions: Compete in large-scale events, including disciplines such as eventing and western riding. Estate Designing: Customize the appearance of your estate's buildings and make it uniquely yours. Horse Breeding: Breed horses like never before in a horse game. More Horse Breeds: Discover additional horse breeds to enhance your herd. Wild Animals: Encounter and interact with various wildlife species as you explore the world. Gardening: Grow plants, crops, horse feed, or flowers as a source of income. Fishing: Enjoy the serene waters by fishing to catch a variety of species or other surprises. Western Riding : Explore a dedicated mode focused entirely on Western riding and enjoy the authentic atmosphere of this unique style. Embark on a one-of-a-kind adventure, live your equestrian dreams, and help shape the future of Unbridled. The journey begins now, what story will you create?

name: Absence of Light
detailed_description: 🎮 Delve into the World of Absence of Light: Embark on an Epic Action RPG Adventure in Cloudia! 🗡️ 🌟 Immerse yourself in the captivating realm of Absence of Light, set in the mesmerizing world of Cloudia! Prepare to be mesmerized by a medieval-inspired journey, where mystical treasures and powerful weapons await your discovery. Take control of a heroic character and forge your arsenal with diverse weapons, each possessing unique attributes to strategically unleash devastating attacks upon the forces of darkness that now rule the once-glorious Old Realm. 💥 Unleash the Power of Action RPG Gameplay: face challenging battles, and uncover hidden secrets in an immersive gaming experience that will keep you hooked for hours! 🏰 Discover the Enchanting Realm of Cloudia: Traverse through the charming village area, interact with intriguing characters, and collect valuable items that will aid you in your quest to restore light to Cloudia. ⚔️ Master Formidable Combos: Choose your weapons wisely and create powerful combinations to conquer the darkness and bring back the radiance to Cloudia! 📜 Unravel the Prologue: The fate of Cloudia hangs in the balance, and only your courage can shatter the sinister grasp of the shadows. Are you ready to become a legend? 🚀 Join the Gaming Community: Connect with fellow adventurers, share tips, and showcase your achievements in Cloudia. Get ready for epic battles and unforgettable moments!

name: Brinkmanship
detailed_description: Brinkmanship is a first-person sci-fi mystery about a colony ship that has secretly changed course. The ship has 30,000 people on it and has been traveling for 20 years, your entire life. Now the future you’ve been promised is slipping away. The player must investigate the ship to find out what’s going on and confront the ship’s captain to get it back on track. Brinkmanship emphasizes conversation over violence, but leaves the gun on the table. Investigate a Thrilling Sci-Fi Conspiracy Immerse yourself in a gripping narrative as you uncover hidden truths, and decipher the cryptic motives steering the vessel off-course. With each revelation, the stakes heighten, and the fate of everyone you’ve ever known hangs in the balance. Dynamic interactions influence character dialogue Arm yourself with the option to draw, stow, or fire your weapon during critical conversations, the power of choice extends beyond words and adds a layer of tension. Influence the narrative with the subtle threat of force or the restraint of diplomacy, shaping the evolving story in unexpected ways. Choose Violence or Eloquence to Guide the Fate of Your Crew The destiny of the 30,000 souls aboard the colony ship lies in your hands. Will you tread the path of violence, asserting dominance and control, or will you rely on eloquence and negotiation to sway the course of events? Maybe you’ll even take a bribe to make your accusations disappear… Brinkmanship offers a unique blend of strategic decision-making, where your choices echo across the vast expanse of space, dooming the ship you were born on delivering it to the world you’ve been promised. Brinkmanship was made by USC students and published through the USC Games Publishing Association. For more information, please visit our publishing page. To learn more about the USC Games program, the #1 game program in the world, please visit the website listed on the right side of the store page.

name: Lustful Vampire
detailed_description: Lustful Vampire is a visual novel exclusively for adults! This story is about how a jewel seeker was looking for a very expensive ring. But instead of a ring, she met a vampire who simply fucked her in all holes! In this wonderful game you have to plunge into the story of a girl who has been looking for a very expensive ring for a long time and hard. She wanted to get this ring from the tomb and sell it. But there is no ring in the tomb. Instead, a real vampire sleeps there! The girl wakes up the vampire and he has no choice but to fuck her in all holes! Get real pleasure from a very simple gameplay and cool music. Beautiful graphics! Relaxing music! Exciting sex scenes!

name: Pirates Outlaws
detailed_description: Pirates Outlaws is an indie roguelike card game in which you navigate dangerous seas and challenge their masters. Your expedition will be full of ambushes and will not be easy. 16 Heroes | More than 700 Cards and 200 Relics | 150+ Oultaws and 60+ unique bosses 3 game modes can be enjoyed. NAVIGATE In Navigate mode you manage your expedition on varied horizons to discover and battle pirates and outlaws that stand on your path. You can unlock up to 7 maps and chapters with their own difficulty and secret. Once repute reaches 9999, Hard Mode auto-unlock. Harsher environments and stronger enemies. Each chapter also has its unique challenge in Hard Mode. ARENA In the dust of the arena, you will face every 10 battles a powerful Champion. To reach the top, you must choose among the cards and relics from all 7 chapters. A place for all pirates in need of challenge. TAVERN BRAWL Test your strength and knowledge over a drink at the tavern. Choose pre-made packages before each battle and defeat the wave of pirates. After the 2 battles, defeat the imposing Tavern Keeper. WORKSHOP Customize your own adventure. You can create heroes, skins, cards, relics, packages, upgrades, enemy skins!

name: Sex Diary - Swingers Yacht
detailed_description: An explicit erotic visual novel following the story of two college buddies sharing their gorgeous soon-to-be wives on a luxury yacht. About the game Ryan and Lisa are all about a great time. That’s why they have decided to tie the knot on a private Island in the middle of the Pacific, inviting every single one of their crazy friends and even crazier family members for a week to remember. Six days of pure bliss: relaxing under the warm sun, swimming in the shallow waters, eating and drinking the local flavors, all culminating with the big day! Twenty four hours of drinking, dancing ( and yes, probably fucking ) in the craziest and noisiest wedding party the Island ever had. But when that special week turns into a never ending drinking and dancing frenzy from day one, with absolutely no time to enjoy each other, they decide to take the yacht out for a nocturnal getaway, miles away from the prying eyes of their crazy families. Their plans were about to be ruined when they found out their only skipper was drunk and in no position to sail. Lucky for them, Ryan’s buddy Drake and his fiancee Aiko were fooling around on the beach and saw them sneaking on the Yacht. Drake was not only an esteemed sailor, but also a very generous lover. He couldn’t pass up a perfect opportunity to make love to his young fiancee on a luxury Yacht. Both men have big plans for tonight, each with his soon to be wife. Will they manage to keep them to themselves? Or will the girls have other fun ideas? Follow the story and find out…

name: Super Captain 3D
detailed_description: The Pixel Invaders have targeted Earth for its destruction! But we don’t have to worry, with the help of Super Captain 3D and you; the Invaders can be stopped and have peace returned to our world. Fight these evildoers and return them back to where they belong. Game Features: A shoot-em-up where you are a Super Hero. Use your Metal Form, Laser Beam and Light Speed to defeat the Invaders. Gain Experience fighting enemies to level up your Super Powers however you see fit. SUPER Power-ups! Spread shot, Pierce shot, Explosive shot and Orb Shield! No lives! As an invisible Super Hero your job is to protect your City, Earth and even the Galaxy or else it's Gameover! Traverse 8 different stages in the Story Mode, including the skies of a city or the vast space. Fight over 20 kind of aliens, including 4 evil bosses. Secret unlockables that further develop the story and add more gameplay! A Super Heroic original soundtrack full of electronic beats!

name: The Holyburn Witches
detailed_description: In the once tranquil village of Holyburn, Maine, a series of horrific incidents left scars that still linger. Unexplained sounds and sightings haunt the desolate forests near this derelict town. Can you survive to unravel the mystery steeped in a history of ritualistic horrors? 'The Holyburn Witches' is a pure survival-horror experience, featuring meticulously crafted panoramic photographs that capture the fear and solitude of being alone in a haunted forest. The thick atmosphere will crawl under your skin, and every nerve-wracking moment will leave you desperate for escape. Collect enough firewood during the day to build a bonfire at night. If it goes out, the witches come. Can you endure enough days and nights to survive the Holyburn Witches?

name: Family
detailed_description: Family is a first-person horror game in which the player takes on the role of Steve, a 10-year-old boy who loves to spend his time playing in the street with his friends or with his toys. His parents always advised him never to go to play on the street tenth because it was really very dangerous. Until one day hidden from his parents he ventures down that dark and hideous street and is faced with a mansion that attracted him, without thinking twice he managed to jump over the wall and started exploring that place full of mysteries, but soon he realizes that you're not alone. In that place they lived a very united family, full of happiness that one day came to an end with the invasion of a serial killer that brought chaos to this family that were finally victims of this pitiful episode, in the deathbed they demanded a terrible curse in that place, where they swore that whoever invaded the mansion they would leave their graves so that whoever was there would not leave alive and would feel the same terror of that last day that this family was united! Help Steve exploring various rooms in this mansion, kitchens, living rooms and backyards very important to always be cautious, because danger always lurks in silence is your best friend, staying in that place is not a choice, running away is the best option!

name: ArrowBall
detailed_description: ArrowBall is a Local Multiplayer Sports game where players use explosive arrows and acrobatics to outmaneuver their opponents and control THE BALL on a variety of unique Stages. Overview Challenge your friends in 1v1 or 2v2 competitions where both teams try to get THE BALL into the opposing team's goal to score points. Run, jump, fire explosive arrows, activate Clutch Mode to set up the perfect shot, or launch a devastating Super Arrow. Charge your Super Bar by defending your goal and spend it to activate Clutch Mode or your Super Arrow. Stages Each match takes place on one of 6 different stages with unique layouts and features HighRise - A no-frills stage in the ritzy part of town Arena - A simple, fast-paced stage with a large crowd to cheer you on Laser Dome - A stage that takes place in a swanky night-club, features disappearing blocks and a randomized layout HyperLoop - Play on top of a speeding train as hazards shift the play field around you Factory - Give the workers some entertainment on their lunch break in this stage with conveyor belts and a shrinking goal zone ClockTower - Play on the inside of a clock-tower as the stage rotates around you Super Arrows There are 8 Super Arrows all with unique effects and characteristics. Super Arrows consume a large chunk of your Super Bar so make sure to use them wisely. Warhead - Send THE BALL flying at max speed with a huge explosion Slicer - Cut THE BALL into 2 THE BALLs Repulsor - Create a protective force-field to repel THE BALL Grapple - Hook THE BALL and yank it towards you Smash - Become an arrow and send your body hurling towards THE BALL Volley - Shoot 9 small explosive arrows in an arc Rocket - Control a small rocket-powered arrow Laser - Shoot an arrow that bounces off of walls Clutch Mode You can activate Clutch Mode at any moment to slow down time and line up the perfect shot or make a last-minute save. Clutch Mode consumes your Super Bar as you use it so it won't last forever. Features: Engage in thrilling local multiplayer matches with 2-4 Friends/Enemies Master 8 different Super Arrows with devastating and tricky effects Play Across 6 Stages with unique layouts and mechanics Send THE BALL on the trip of a lifetime into your opponent's goal

name: Get Gem
detailed_description: When the screen is dark Please set the game quality higher from the option in the upper right of the menu screen. (Set to 'Good' or higher) About the Game Simple 3D 3rd person view search game. Manipulate a 13 year-old Saya and a 23 year-old Saya to find jewelry in her grandfather's mansion in the countryside. A light game for all ages. Not for core gamers or shooters. Features of the game 3D 3rd Person View Game (Be careful as it is not a shooter.) A level design created from scratch. The atmosphere of a country mansion. All you have to do is get all the jewelry in the building and you're done. There are 32 jewels. Simple operation. There are only 2 types of operation: 'walk' and 'get a jewel'. You can't do things like 'run' 'jump' 'crouch' or 'shoot a gun'. The door opens and closes automatically when the player approaches. Save Load function (1 save slot) Level 1 : When Saya was 13, she lived with her grandfather in his mansion in the country. Her grandfather's hobby was collecting jewels, but she always got scolded because she found and got them in his mansion. Level 2 : 10 years have passed since then. Saya drove to the mansion where she used to live with her grandpa. Controls WALK: W, A, S, D GET the gem: E Camera: Mouse Pause menu: ESC Xbox controller WALK: Left stick GET the gem: X Camera: Right stick Controls(mini game puzzle) Mouse wheel: Camera zoom Mouse drag: Camera move, Move puzzle piece

name: Double world. cave song castle
detailed_description: Do you believe that in the city where you live, in those dark places, beside you, there are things that break common sense? It is man-made that a city happened an confused accident in a sudden? Whether the unknown thing existed in the darkest of the world. Superpower, monster, magic may be right by our side. In the dark, the ‘monsters’ from the different world, organized to investigate the unknowns. ——————————Introduction to the game—————————— Look at the screenshot can know, this is a horizontal version of 2D fighting game. But strictly speaking, it can't be regarded as an action fighting game. After all, there are so few animation. The difficulty of the game is divided into three modes: easy, normal and hard, and it is also divided into plot mode and no plot mode, with a total of six play modes. Developer's recommendation: [/] If you only want to watch the plot, you can choose easy plot mode to play. Just want to play the game of optional normal no plot mode to play. Want to challenge the optional hard no plot mode to play. It's better to follow the advice. After all, you can't skip the plot. If you put yourself at risk to choose the hard mode, some of the testers will called you daddy. Game features: [/] The author plays fewer games, so I don't know what features can be said. Here are some unique ones ——Three way attack: they are 'up', 'middle' and 'down'. The W and s keys can adjust the attack direction. ——Tired death mechanism: in addition to movement and stillness and triggering, the object controlled by the player will consume physical strength no matter what he does. If the physical strength is exhausted, he can continue to play, but will let his health replace his physical strength. ——Somersault mechanism: This is an unintentional feature / bug. The combination of Ctrl roll and space jump can form a 'somersault' action. The rest of the mechanisms are not unique, such as the property panel. I won't list them here. ——————————characters introduce—————————— ——————————Q & A—————————— Q: The store display supports English. Why is it still Chinese after entering the game? A: Click option in the lower right corner to find the '语言' option and switch to English.

name: Gauntlet™ Slayer Edition
detailed_description: The classic Gauntlet 4-player co-op action gameplay returns in a completely new experience! Play as one of four distinct heroes in an intense monster filled dungeon brawler with a combination of both uniquely built and randomly generated levels to explore. Battle the endless hordes of foes as you and your friends fight for treasure and glory via both local and online co-op multiplayer. Invade the Darkness! New Gauntlet Experience Classic dungeon crawling action is melded with innovative new features for the ultimate Gauntlet challenge. Online and Couch Co-op Multiplayer Explore on your own if you dare or play with friends in 4-player same-screen and online co-op. Your friends can become foes as you compete to see who can claim the most kills and the most gold. Four Classic Characters Gauntlet’s four classic characters: Warrior, Valkyrie, Elf, and Wizard return but with more distinctive play styles and their own unique skills. Discover New Powers Players can scour the dungeons for gold and loot to unlock mystical Relics that grant the holder deadly new abilities. But beware – if used incorrectly they can be detrimental to your party’s health! How Will You Die? Fiendish traps, monstrous hordes, epic bosses and even your own friends will cause you to die in confounding and extraordinary ways. Accolades: “An idealized reboot of the series – immediately familiar yet totally fresh.” – Digital Trends “You haven’t needed food this badly since the 1980’s” – Gamespot “Just the way fans would want it” - Destructoid 'Fans of the classic 80s game have nothing to worry about.' - PrimaGames 'This classic quarter-muncher consumed a lot of my own money during summers as a kid, so it's nice to see the fantasy gameplay live on this latest incarnation.' - Fortune 'With its simple, streamlined controls and the compatibility with SteamOS, 'Gauntlet' is clearly nostalgic for the living room-centric gaming of the early 90s. And it succeeds.' - Tom's Guide

name: For Ever Melancholia
detailed_description: 'You are joining our club.' You're young, you're energetic, you dream of writing a thesis on extinct nation, it is hot summer outside and the sky is blinding and blue, and you have a whole full life ahead of you. Good times! Summer training takes place far away from the City, your room is far from being comfy and the campus roofs give leaks like they're made of paper. But there is a bright side to it! You're surrounded by the most beautiful girls in the world! And they like cinema too, just like you: not the summer blockbusters — the real cinema, auteur movies, where the soul of an author is hidden inside a puzzle box. This is going to be fun ! If you dig deep enough, you may find treasures. Or bones. Or a curse. Or everything of the above. If you think too much... Well, I guess, we'll find out, right? For Ever Melancholia is a kinetic visual novel about movies, archaeology and psychology, as in 'psyche', if you know what I mean. Featuring: linear story; auteur cinema, jazz and classical music pieces; in fact, you can watch this novel as a movie (you'll still have to read the text, though); cutscenes, like, actual video cutscenes; old friends... young friends? young old friends? OH, RIGHT, WE ALSO GOT BOOBS HERE. Tasteful boobs!

name: Space Wars
detailed_description: Step into the cockpit of a customizable spacecraft and defend Earth from a relentless alien invasion in SPACE WARS, an immersive arcade scrolling shooter. Battle through 15 challenging levels across 3 unique locations as you destroy enemy ships, face powerful bosses, and protect the orbital station from total destruction. Upgrade your ship with advanced weapons, shields, and abilities by collecting power-ups from broken capsules. Stunning visuals and atmospheric soundtracks will transport you into the heart of the space battle, making each mission feel more intense as you fight to save humanity. Key Features: Ship Customization: Upgrade your ship’s weapons, shields, and speed to fit your combat style. Diverse Enemies: Face 10 types of enemy ships with unique attack patterns. Powerful Boss Battles: Test your skills in epic confrontations with massive alien bosses. Immersive Visuals: Experience detailed 2D/2.5D space environments and smooth combat animations. Challenging Progression: Complete 15 levels with increasing difficulty across 3 different locations.

name: Pirates: Golden tits: Chapter 1
detailed_description: Collector's Edition New DLC Available About the Game Pirates: Golden tits: Chapter 1 Is an explicit pirate simulator. You get to control a young pirate captain, who has just acquired his first ship and who also has lots of adventures, treasures and wet girls awaiting him! Of course, everything you can do in the game has to be achieved, you have to learn to get those shiners! There a lot of ways to do that, actually, such as robbery, trading, fishing or even gambling. But don't get the wrong impression, it's not as easy as it might seem. You're not the only one out there. Be prepared to spend your precious gold not only on sexy girls, but also on upgrades for your ship, new ships and other ways to protect yourself and your riches. Also, don't forget you can hire not only bluejackets, but people with unique abilities and traits. And for some reason, they're all female (we have absolutely no idea why ;)). So, if you can find the right way to approach them, they might make your day a little bit brighter. And that's not all that awaits you. So shake the dust off your tricorn and take the helm! Tons of adult scenes more than 5 towns More than 20 islands More than 40 locations More than 50 characters More than 30 different ships 5 Nations (England, France, Spain, Holland, Pirates) Active town map Marine battles and Boarding Combat system Inventory and money system Changing character stats Many minigames A lot of various tags and fetishes Complex nonlinear storyline MILF Big tits Femdom Blowjob Voyeurism Anal Corruption BDSM Adult toys Interracial Foot Fetish Humiliation Hypnosis Bisexuals Lesbians

name: GALACTIC FIELD 《银河领域》
detailed_description: This is a brand new space sci-fi flight shooting game. The story of the game takes place in a distant future world, which is about an interstellar war between three different factions. Players can choose the spaceship pilot status of any faction faction to join the interstellar war of these factions. At the same time, players can also control various types of spaceships to fight with the frontline enemies. In addition to advocating fast-paced competitive flight shooting gameplay, the game also provides a variety of personalized modes and gameplay details setting functions. It is especially suitable for live streaming. The host can easily interact with the audience anytime while playing. In addition, the game is non-violent and suitable for players of any age, especially those who like sci-fi warfare and space flight. Right now, the game is a basic version, and more modes will be added in the future. Due to limited resources, there are only single-player and double-player modes. However, you can get free updates. Hope you will like and support this game! Game Features: Fast-paced, exciting, shooting, sci-fi, space Reminder - the game has many customizable mode options. It is recommended that players adjust and play in their own favorite mode. The official default mode may not be suitable for every player's preference.

name: Centrist
detailed_description: Centrist is a block stacking game where your goal is to place blocks around the center piece in a perfect square formation. Blocks will appear from 4 different directions. The game gets harder as you destroy more blocks. The player has 10 health and the game will end once it drops to 0. If a block is placed at the spawning line, you will take 5 damage and nearby blocks will be cleared. If a block falls off the board you will lose health depending on the number of blocks the piece has (Bombs will always deal 5 damage) Scores: 10 points for each block placed 10 points for each block destroyed 1st layer = 640 points 2nd layer = 2,560 points 3rd layer = 5,760 points 4th layer = 10,240 points 5th layer = 16,000 points 6th layer = 23,040 points 7th layer = 31,360 points 8th layer = 40,960 points 9th layer = 51,840 points 10th layer = 64,000 points Special blocks: Once there are at least 20 blocks on the board every 5th block will be a bomb. The more blocks there are, the more powerful effects you will get. Bombs will explode upon collision and can be detonated sideways. Bomb: destroys all blocks in a 3 x 3 range Big Bomb: destroys all blocks in a 5 x 5 range Filler Bomb: creates blocks in a 3 x 3 range Beam: destroys all blocks in a line Mega Beam: destroys all blocks in 3 lines Shockwave Bomb: forces blocks within a 5 block radius to collapse towards the center Flame: destroyed blocks upon collision (maximum 30 blocks) Big Flame: destroyed blocks upon collision (maximum 60 blocks) Game modes: Centrist There are some irregular shapes Bombs will appear Blocks cannot be rotated Classic Only classic block shapes Blocks can be rotated Bombs will not appear Outer layers will collapse Bombastic Only classic block shapes Blocks can be rotated Bombs will appear Extremist Only classic block shapes Blocks can be rotated There are blocks in corners instead of center Bombs will appear

name: Paws for Adventure
detailed_description: Paws for Adventure is a retro styled adventure game inspired by old school Zelda games but with cats. Play the part of Cocoa a black cat who gets separated from his owners and ends up living with wild cats in the forest. Legend, action and adventures await as Cocoa fights, sings and hunts his way through the land. Hunt prey for food. Each animal gives different boosts to stats so keep an eye out for the more elusive prey. Sleep at the graves of past cats. Cats who have passed on may have important skills to teach you. Meow magical melodies. Different songs will have different effects on yourself or the world around you. Explore The forest, dungeons, caves, canyons, beaches and more in your quest to save the cat colonies.

name: Quantum Break
detailed_description: In the aftermath of a split second of destruction that fractures time itself, two people find they have changed and gained extraordinary abilities. One of them travels through time and becomes hell-bent on controlling this power. The other uses these new abilities to attempt to defeat him – and fix time before it tears itself irreparably apart. Both face overwhelming odds and make dramatic choices that will determine the shape of the future. Quantum Break is a unique experience; one part hard-hitting video game, one part thrilling live action show, featuring a stellar cast, including Shawn Ashmore as the hero Jack Joyce, Aidan Gillen as his nemesis Paul Serene and Dominic Monaghan as Jack’s genius brother William. Quantum Break is full of the vivid storytelling, rich characters and dramatic twists Remedy Entertainment are renowned for. Your choices in-game will affect the outcome of this fast-paced fusion between game and show giving the player a completely unique entertainment experience. FEATURES: • In-depth, fast-paced narrative experience crafted by Remedy Entertainment • Top quality live action show that is directly impacted by choices made in-game • Stellar cast of actors • One story told many ways • Time-amplified action gameplay • Navigate epic scenes of destruction as they skip and rewind in broken time

name: Pixel Pursuit
detailed_description: *In a super deep movie voice* In a world deprived of pixels, Bit needs your help to restore the resolution in Chrominance. By using your sick pixel gun and platforming skills you can help save Chrominance from Spectre and get the girl (just kidding that's totally generic). To complete this bad ♥♥♥ adventure you must go through a series of 3 worlds, each containing 20 levels (that's a total of 60 levels in case you have some trouble with math). There are a variety of obstacles you will have to surpass in each level, which will progressively become harder as you go. Some of these include spikes, lava, and enemies with guns. At the end of each world, these obstacles will seem pathetic compared to the boss of the world. Once you defeat the boss, some of the pixels in Chrominance will return. After defeating all 3 bosses, Chrominance will be completely restored. Will you save Chrominance?

name: Second World: Air War S
detailed_description: Second World: Air War S, This is a fighter jet shooting game: a battle that takes place on floating islands. You are a pilot of a bumblebee fixed wing fighter aircraft. The fighter aircraft is armed with advanced weapons: Machine guns/Missiles/Engine booster/Energy shield. The fighter aircraft flies over a series of jaw-dropping floating islets. To enhance game operability, the aircraft flies on a fixed path. The critical element of the game is the shooting part, of course. When swarms of enemy fleets descend from the sky and firing out countless bullets that fill the whole screen, activate the engine booster to dodge some of the attacks. And there is the crazy invincible mode renders you immune to enemy’s attack for a limited time. Find particular enemies and destroy them to get weapon supplies. Features ■ The island of flare with erupting volcanos ■ The island of luminescence with lightning ■ Flying over dazzling floating islands ■ Leviathan battleships that give players shocking visual impacts ■ 99 rounds of missiles that can aim at multiple targets ■ Full-thrust flying ■ International ranking Mission ■ Fire Isand: Missile ship*2 / Sky turret*3 / Tank*4 (9 enemies for this stage). ■ Night Light Island: Boss battleship*1 / Light battleship*3 / Sky turret*3 / Tank*6 (13 enemies for this stage).

name: Boing
detailed_description: Introducing 'Boing' – Unleash Cosmic Chaos in this Retro Arcade Thriller! Get ready for an explosive adventure as you step into the role of the ultimate cosmic guardian in 'Boing.' Embark on an action-packed journey through over 200 levels of interstellar mayhem, defending the universe against relentless waves of enemies. 🚀 Master the Power: Assume control of a formidable cosmic weapon as you fend off hordes of adversaries that grow stronger and more cunning with every passing moment. 🔥 Upgrade for Supremacy: Ascend to your full potential by customizing your weapon with an array of enhancements and power-ups. Evolve your arsenal and become an unstoppable force against the chaos that threatens the universe. 🕹️ Retro-Inspired Rush: Immerse yourself in a nostalgic arcade experience, where lightning-fast reflexes and pinpoint accuracy are your greatest allies. 'Boing' harkens back to the golden era of gaming, delivering a thrilling challenge that will test your skills to the limit. 🎶 A Symphony of Ambience: Immerse yourself in the ethereal atmosphere of 'Boing,' with an engaging soundtrack and satisfying sound effects that enhance your every move. Feel the rush as you take down enemies and conquer challenges. 💥 The Universe Depends on You: Face the relentless onslaught head-on and become the cosmic guardian the universe needs. Can you withstand the pressure and emerge victorious in the battle against cosmic chaos? Prepare for a dynamic arcade experience like no other in 'Boing.' With its blend of retro vibes, frenetic action, and strategic upgrades, this game will push you to the edge and challenge you to save the universe. As the Boing, it's time to shine among the stars! 🎮 Key Features: • Engage in over 200 thrilling levels of cosmic chaos. • Customize the Boing with upgrades and power-ups to dominate the battlefield. • Experience seamless gameplay with keyboard, mouse, or your preferred combination. • Immerse yourself in an ambient soundscape and enjoy satisfying sound effects that amplify your actions. Unleash your inner cosmic hero and become the guardian the universe has been waiting for. Can you rise to the challenge and conquer the chaos in 'Boing'? The stars await your command!

name: Molementum
detailed_description: Get ready for a Heist Party! Molementum is a 3D party action game where you assume the role of a mole criminal to rob mines of their precious gems. Grab up to 3 friends and scramble your way through industrial mines engaging in various acts of competitive mischief as you try to become the most notorious mole criminal. Upgrade yourself between rounds with different abilities that will extend your nefarious arsenal to complete constantly changing objectives. Battle your friends! Compete with up to three other players online in the ultimate heist party. Outsmart and outmaneuver your friends in order to collect the most gems! Gain molementum! Move around by swapping between digging and rolling - dig for fast reactive movement that can allow you to burrow up underneath your fellow moles to attack, or use the momentum of a roll to gain even more speed and become an unstoppable fireball that grows in reach with your speed. Upgrade your mole! Unlock a bevy of unique and wacky upgrades between rounds of play. Take to the skies, stun other players, and summon otherworldly buddies to your command. Changing challenges! Players will face different objectives round to round that tie into an evolving story. Collect the most soda, fight to stay on camera, and fight each other!

name: The Fire Nobody Started
detailed_description: “Nobody started the Fire, But It still consumes the World” Are the pains and social conflicts we endure today the ultimate consequences of our ancestors’ mistakes? History flows as a trajectory to the present, and our society is the product of that history. The Fire Nobody Started follows the lives of ancestors, beginning in England and continuing into America. This game retraces the paths leading to the present, exploring the roads not taken and the aspirations of those seeking dreamlike destinations. “This is a train to 21C, via 19C. Passengers will require a valid click to use this service. Passengers are advised that this train consists of 9 cars, divided by each era. Please mind the fire. This train is ready to depart, please stand clear of the fire.” This game is an adventure divided into nine train cars, each representing an era in the journey of a family of Irish descent, spanning from the Industrial Revolution in England to the Vietnam War in America. Players will move sequentially through each train car, interacting with characters from each era to explore its historical context. Through this journey, players will experience the flow of modern history and its paradigm shifts. From urbanization to the global shift of focus toward America, the game examines major transitions like the move from Newtonian worldviews to quantum theories, and the human rights movements of each era, offering an immersive perspective on history centered around England and America. Each train car is carefully crafted to mirror the trains of its era, incorporating the artistic movements of the time. Every car showcases a distinct art style, delivering a visually captivating and immersive experience—a hallmark of the game. While this is a linear text-graphic adventure with a predetermined outcome, the compelling stories of its characters and the game’s meticulous historical accuracy ensure a memorable experience for all players.

name: The Tale of Doris and the Dragon - Episode 1
detailed_description: Welcome to the first day of the rest of your afterlife Please take a ticket and join the queue in an orderly fashion. The Tale of Doris and the Dragon is an episodic, point-and-click adventure game series featuring an elderly lady named Doris who finds herself in Purgatory after passing away on earth. On her journey, Doris meets many weird and wonderful characters that help or try to hinder her progress. Out of this, an unlikely friendship emerges. Purgatory - Doris finds herself in a strange land with no hope of returning to the world she once knew. After passing away on earth, our brave heroine must journey through the afterlife in search of her husband, Albert. Puzzles - On her journey, Doris meets a cast of Underworld natives that aren’t always the most helpful. Solve puzzles and help Doris nag her way through the red tape of Limbo’s middle management. Peril - You wouldn’t think it, but the After life is a dangerous place. With the help of her new found friends, Doris uncovers a sinister plot which threatens to destroy both life and death itself. +.+.+.+.+.+.+.+.+.+.+.+.+.+.+.+.+.+.+.+.+.+.+.+.+.+.+.+.+.+.+.+.+.+.+.+.+.+.+.+.+. Key Features A RETRO, PIXEL-ART GAME which reminds you of those 90s graphic adventure classics that you couldn’t forget if you tried. A POINT AND CLICK ADVENTURE is a game genre that emphasises puzzle solving and quirky narrative. The minimalist nature of the interface allows the player to simply ‘point and click’ to explore the world. FULLY VOICE-ACTED game; starring Ben Simpson and Jamie Wood CREATED BY AN INDEPENDENT COMPANY which means that we 100% self-publish, self-fund our project and in-house all of our production MUSIC AND SOUND DESIGN has been important to us in every game that we have created together. The Tale of Doris and the Dragon is no exception, with a haunting soundtrack by AssadB; foley and sound design by Ryan Callard.

name: Chaos Faction Legacy Collection
detailed_description: Chaos Faction and Chaos Faction 2, the iconic Flash games that defined a generation, come together in the Chaos Faction Legacy Collection, both in their original format. Whether you’re a veteran of the chaotic battles or a newcomer ready to experience the mayhem for the first time, this collection is the ultimate tribute to the legendary brawlers. Two Games, One Legacy The original Chaos Faction set the standard for fast-paced, explosive arena combat. Customize your character, select your weapons, and face off across a range of creative and dangerous levels. With its simple yet addictive gameplay, Chaos Faction became a staple of Flash gaming, now available to relive in its full glory. Chaos Faction 2, the sequel, builds on everything that made the original a hit and takes it to the next level. Battle through 15 campaign levels, each filled with weapons, characters, and moves, plus even more explosions. Progress unlocks powerful new fighters and gear ( Three brand new bonus characters included! ), leading to an epic showdown with the Hypergon. Endless Gameplay Modes With multiple gameplay modes, including Campaign, Deathmatch, and Survival, you can enjoy countless hours of chaotic action. In Campaign mode, every victory unlocks new characters and weapons, pushing you closer to the ultimate battle. Deathmatch mode lets you create your own rules, offering endless replayability with customizable maps, enemies, and allies. And in Survival mode, test your skills against an onslaught of increasingly difficult foes. Join the Chaos Whether you’re playing solo or with a friend in Local Co-Op, the Chaos Faction Legacy Collection delivers non-stop action, hilarious mayhem, and a nostalgic gaming experience. Customize your characters, dominate the arenas, and relive the legacy of one of the greatest series in Flash game history. It’s time to reclaim your place in the chaos!

name: Nora Wanna Rise
detailed_description: Nora Wanna Rise In 'Nora Wanna Rise', players embark on an exhilarating journey with Nora, a parkour athlete determined to push her limits. The story begins amidst the ruins of an ancient castle, where every stone seems to tell a tale. Swiftly, the action shifts to the bustling streets of a modern metropolis, requiring dexterity and quick reflexes to navigate through urban obstacles. The adventure reaches its climax in a futuristic space station, where reduced gravity offers a new playground for breathtaking acrobatics. Across diverse stages, the game challenges players to master the art of movement, while exploring a world rich in detail and surprises. 'Nora Wanna Rise' is an invitation to exploration, skillfully blending action and adventure in a captivating universe. Detailed Description Setting the Scene The game begins in the heart of the mysterious depths of a vast cave, an ancient sanctuary where the weight of history resonates in solemn silence. Guided by the instinct of discovery, players take control of Nora's destiny as she makes her way through this initial challenge. They learn the basics of movement and feel the thrill of exploration in a place where every shadow and rock formation seems to tell part of an ancient story. This initial stage sets the tone for the entire adventure, mixing natural majesty and the echo of lost civilizations in a setting that awakens the imagination and encourages discovery. The scene then transforms, transporting us to the imposing walls of an ancient castle. In this environment, players are immersed in a completely different type of parkour challenge. The castle, with its towering turrets, spiral staircases, and secret passages, offers a unique playground for agility and precision. The ancient stone and vast courtyards test players' reflexes, inviting them to master speed and leverage medieval architecture to progress. This stage is a celebration of agility, challenging players to navigate through a maze of historical richness and architectural beauty. After navigating the imposing remnants of the ancient castle, the adventure thrusts Nora directly into the pulsating heart of a metropolis overflowing with life. This change of scenery plunges players into an entirely renewed parkour experience. The city unfolds before them as a vast, unpredictable playground, with its bustling avenues, towering glass and steel towers, and mazes of secret passages. In this urban environment, speed, agility, and precision become crucial as Nora navigates through this modern labyrinth, turning every landscape element into a tool for advancement. The transition from the solemn castle, with its echoes of a distant past, to the dynamism and bustle of the city highlights the diversity of challenges that Nora must face. This stage perfectly illustrates the need to adapt movement techniques to extremely varied contexts, offering a new perspective on the art of displacement. This urban stage is just a glimpse of the wealth of experiences that 'Nora Wanna Rise' offers its players. Beyond urban agility, many other adventures await Nora and those who guide her through her journey. Each environment, each challenge reveals a different facet of the game, inviting exploration, the discovery of novel techniques, and the solving of captivating puzzles. With a diversity of settings ranging from underground depths to celestial peaks, the game promises a journey filled with surprises, learning, and revelations. Players can expect a multitude of secrets to unveil, skills to master, and stories to uncover, making Nora's adventure unforgettable. Key Features Variety of Scenarios : Each environment offers unique challenges, encouraging players to develop and adapt their parkour skills. Immersive Gameplay : Intuitive game mechanics and realistic physics make interacting with the different environments both fluid and engaging. Innovative Challenges : From climbing ancient structures to navigating in space, the game offers a variety of puzzles and obstacles that stimulate thought and agility. Stunning Graphics : A rich and detailed visual that transports players from the ancient to the futuristic, each level designed to visually impress and stimulate exploration. Adaptive Soundtrack : The music evolves with the action, complementing the gaming experience with an auditory immersion that varies according to the environment and intensity of challenges. 'Nora Wanna Rise' stands out as a pure exploration of movement and agility. It highlights the spirit of adventure and physical performance, offering a rich and varied experience through spectacularly realized environments.

name: Sex College 🔞
detailed_description: Welcome to the world of Sex College 🔞, an exciting adult only visual novel that will unravel the secrets of college life and love! You are a determined guy with a mysterious past who has moved to a new college, hoping that luck and love will smile upon him. As the protagonist, you have to make an important choice: join an elite club and enjoy the attention of the hottest girls, or help the director, thereby having a fascinating time with his charming daughter and elegant wife. But be warned: to win the hearts of the beauties, you will have to complete exciting tasks - steal something valuable, plant it, and follow mysterious personalities. For each successful act, the player will be rewarded with frantic flirting and unique moments with the chosen girl. Get ready for incredible choices and exciting twists and turns in Sex College 🔞 - where every whisper can reveal a secret, and every kiss can change your life! Features A fascinating story A Multitude of Sexy Situations An immersive storyline filled with emotional twists and moments that will make your heart race. VN Style story with dynamic camera angles, and outfits you select Diverse characters, each with unique personality traits and backgrounds, making your journey even more intriguing. Ability to play with one hand. ( ͡~ ͜ʖ ͡°)

name: Human Or Virus
detailed_description: Two years after the outbreak of the new coronavirus, the virus has mutated. You will lead your team to face a group of zombies, intelligent robots and various mutant beasts. Laying the foundation for the survival and development of human beings, the optimized system can programmatically change the quality of the game and the player's gaming experience. It can also adjust the number of enemies, effects and sound effects according to the player's performance.
